title: name redaction for hipaa compliance
excerpt: We would like to email client details to our contractors in a HIPAA compliant manner. We name the item by client names and would like to have these names redacted when including the item tag in triggered automated emails…

posts.author: Dovid (Dovid Gross)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to email client details to our contractors in a HIPAA compliant manner. We name the item by client names and would like to have these names redacted when including the item tag in triggered automated emails. Having an option to redact item names would be amazing for our workflow
